name_local: Catedral de Santa Maria de Girona

phrases.intent_en: Ask if guided tours are running now
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay visitas guiadas disponibles en este momento?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, AH-yeh bee-SEE-tahs gee-AH-dahs dee-poh-nee-BLEHS en EH-stoh moh-MEN-toh?

likely_response.local: Sí, cada hora en la Sala
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ KAH-dah OH-rah EHN LAH SAH-lah
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, are there guided tours available right now?

responses.english: Good morning, are there guided tours available right now?
responses.phonetic: SÍ KAH-dah OH-rah EHN LAH SAH-lah
responses.french: Sí, cada hora en la Sala

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the treasury is located
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el museo del tesoro?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el moo-SEH-oh del teh-SOH-roh?

likely_response.local: Dentro, junto a la sacristía antigua.
likely_response.pronunciation: DEHNT-roh HOON-toh AH LAH sahth-ree-STÍ-ah ahn-tee-G-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, where is the treasury museum?

responses.english: Good morning, where is the treasury museum?
responses.phonetic: DEHNT-roh HOON-toh AH LAH sahth-ree-STÍ-ah ahn-tee-G-ah
responses.french: Dentro, junto a la sacristía antigua.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la taquilla?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah?

likely_response.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the square, on the left.

responses.english: At the square, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the accessible entrance is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde se encuentra la entrada accesible?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, ¿DOHN-deh seh en-kwen-TRAH lah en-TRAH-dah ak-seh-SEE-bleh?

likely_response.local: Por la puerta lateral junto al claustro.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah lah-teh-RAHL HOON-toh AHL klah-OO-stroh
likely_response.translation_en: To the side, a ramp is available.

responses.english: To the side, a ramp is available.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah lah-teh-RAHL HOON-toh AHL klah-OO-stroh
responses.french: Por la puerta lateral junto al claustro.
